dm_location: Chapter 5 (Quality Design) + Chapter 12 (Implementation/quantitative tables) + Appendix 10 (Height & Density Guide)
wastewater_standard: EPA Code of Practice where relevant (predominantly mains-serviced; not a standalone trigger)
residential_density_dph: No numerical density limit; contextual/performance framework (Appendix 10)
separation_distance_m: circa 22 m between opposing windows (incl. apartments up to three storeys)
private_open_space: Houses 48/55/60/70/92/110 sq m by tier; apartments 4-9 sq m + communal
car_parking_dwelling: MAXIMUM rates; House 1 bed 1, 2 bed 1.5/1.25, 3 bed+ 2/1.5 (Zone1/Zone2); Apartment 0.75-1.5
building_height: No numerical height limit; context-based per Appendix 10 / SPPR1 Building Heights Guidelines 2018
trigger_AA: Screened for AA; Natura Impact Statement if required; referred to NPWS (Art.6(3) Habitats Directive)
trigger_EIA: EIAR above mandatory thresholds (PDR 2001 as amended); sub-threshold discretionary; all apps screened
trigger_FRA: Site-specific FRA by Chartered Engineer on lands at flood risk; 2009 Guidelines; SFRA 2021
trigger_AHIA: Works materially affecting character of a Protected Structure require permission (Section 12.3.7)
trigger_EcIA: EcIA for proposals affecting environmentally sensitive sites/protected species/watercourses
trigger_TTA: Traffic Impact Statements for all major traffic-generating development (TTA Guidelines 2014)
notes: Maximum (not minimum) parking standards. No numeric rural one-off house site area in this urban plan. Dual aspect min 33% (central) / 50% (other). Design Statement for 30+ residential units or commercial over 1,000 sq m. EV: 20% of parking spaces.
